mustKeep: WhatsApp country animation must remain enabled
Main dark-blue and gold premium visual language must remain consistent
No generated images are required for QA
Mobile scrolling must remain smooth and usable
visualChecks: No text overlaps borders, icons, cards, or other text
No words are broken in the middle unless intentionally hyphenated
No large empty hero areas on Blog, Services, UAE/Dubai, Asia, and service pages
Process cards 01-05 are not squeezed into narrow columns
Footer contacts icons and text are aligned and readable
Service card buttons are aligned and do not jump by text length
Blog cards have readable titles, balanced photos, and no gray accidental blocks
Reviews page looks like a full premium section, not a small contact block
Mobile navigation, scrolling, and tap targets work without horizontal overflow
